about.title: About
about.bio: Senior software engineer, 8+ years across aviation, high-traffic consumer platforms, and retail. Full-stack and backend. Production AI: LLM agents, RAG pipelines, structured outputs.
about.education.title: Education
about.education.1: B.Sc. in Computer Science, Unitelma Sapienza University, Rome (2018–2021) (not completed)
about.education.2: Diploma in Business Information Systems, Istituto E. Fermi (2012–2017)
about.learning.title: Continuous Learning
about.learning.1: Algorithms, Data Structures & System Design — neetcode.io
about.learning.2: Backend, Database & Operating Systems fundamentals — Hussein Nasser
about.learning.3: Master Microservices with Spring Boot & Spring Cloud — in28Minutes
about.learning.4: Ultimate Rust Crash Course — Nathan Stocks
skills.title: Core Competencies
skills.1: Languages & Runtimes: TypeScript, Node.js, PHP, .NET, Java
skills.2: Frontend & Mobile: React 19, Next.js, React Native (Expo), Module Federation microfrontends
skills.3: Backend & APIs: Laravel, Hono, Express, tRPC, REST; queue-based workers (BullMQ, Redis)
skills.4: Data & Infrastructure: PostgreSQL, MySQL, Microsoft SQL Server, Redis, Prisma ORM; Docker, Turborepo, Vercel, Railway
skills.5: AI & Search: LLM agents, structured outputs, streaming; RAG with embeddings, BM25, RRF, cross-encoder reranking
skills.6: Quality & Security: Vitest, end-to-end testing, Sentry; OWASP, OAuth/JWT/session authentication
projects.title: Projects
projects.gymtree.title: GymTree
projects.gymtree.desc: Solo-built fitness platform, in App Store review. Full-stack across backend API, coach web, trainee mobile app, marketing site, and background workers.
projects.claudeLocalDocs.title: claude-local-docs
projects.claudeLocalDocs.desc: Open-source Claude Code plugin. Local-first docs indexer with vector embeddings, BM25, Reciprocal Rank Fusion, and cross-encoder reranking.
projects.portfolio.title: Cockpit Portfolio
projects.portfolio.desc: This website. Interactive 3D cockpit portfolio built with Next.js 16, Three.js, and a streaming OpenAI assistant.

experience.05.hero.title: GymTree
experience.05.role.body: **Sole developer** of a fitness platform. Backend API, coach web console, trainee mobile app, and background workers. Production AI for coach chat and personalized plans.
experience.05.ownership.1: **AI coach chat** in production. Persistent conversations and personalized workout/nutrition plan generation.
experience.05.ownership.2: Full-stack ownership across backend, mobile, and web.
experience.05.ownership.4: Workout and nutrition plans generated via **structured output from LLMs**.
